changelog:
Dashboard rework: API Keys tab + Analytics tab.

API Keys tab:
- List, create, edit, revoke and delete API keys via the dashboard (was curl-only in A7).
- Per-key live counters: daily requests / tokens / credits with progress bars + percentage; lifetime totals shown as the 4-cell footer (req / tok / cred / last used).
- Create dialog accepts name + each daily limit (0 = unlimited) + expiry preset (none / 7d / 30d / 90d).
- Revoke disables a key without deleting it (preserves usage history); delete is permanent.

Analytics tab:
- Per-model usage breakdown: requests, tokens, credits per model with horizontal bar chart proportional to credits. In-memory counters that reset on restart (visibility metric, not billing).
- Per-key usage breakdown: lifetime requests / tokens / credits per key with bar chart, sorted by credits.
- Loaded lazily when the tab is first opened.

Backend:
- New /admin/api/modelstats endpoint returning per-model running counters.
- modelstats.go module: thread-safe map keyed by canonical model id, recordModelUsage called from every successful request, resetModelStats hooked into the existing /admin/api/stats/reset.

Full i18n parity (zh + en) for the new strings.

A9: entrypoint chown + su-exec hotfix for data volume permission denied.
A8: dashboard credits use account-true quotaUsed.
A7: backend multi API keys.
A6: security + reliability hardening.
A5: drop Claude Code system prompt entirely when detected.
A4: drop ThinkingModePrompt; split filter chain.
A3: drop --- SYSTEM PROMPT --- markers; structured tool results only.
A2: kiro-go-patch container_name + pull_policy: always.
A1: <system-reminder>/x-anthropic-billing-header strip; /v1/responses; model id echo.
